subcodes.first_line: If a friend with his tongue maketh claim of friendship, yet in deed committeth that which bringeth harm to the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست لسانا دعوی دوستی نماید و فعلا مرتکب شود امری را که ضر آن بمحبوب راجع
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
